audit_items.proof_trace: `hasFeeAggregator` is computed at L318 as `address(s_feeAggregator) != address(this)`, and `transferForSwap` is called at L321 exclusively inside `if (hasFeeAggregator && eligibleAssets.length > 0)`. This is the only production call site for `transferForSwap` in the codebase, so the conditional guard is structurally sufficient. The sentinel pattern (`address(this)` meaning no aggregator) is enforced by `_setFeeAggregator` which rejects any address that is neither `address(this)` nor a valid `IFeeAggregator` implementor.
